Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Test Tone Pink Noise - Volume-DUMP Control
learn mode start reject - ignition state is not the state on
learn mode failed - no valid input data received
learn mode failed - no stable input data received

Data.Name: Software Logical Block Boot Part Number
Software Logical Block Application Part Number
Software Logical Block DiBa Part Number
Analogue Instrument Power Scale Value Type
Analogue Instrument Torque Scale Value Type
Navi POI search by phone number
Support of Histo Traffic Data for ETA calculation
IC Popup - Trigger IC FuncNA Messages

Item.Text: Fuel Consumption and Recuperation Screen and Energy Flow Screen
display Drive Program indication for Onroad
display Drive Program indication for Offroad
display Drive Program indication for Onroad & Offroad

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: Update Map Data - Read Fault DVD
Update Map Data - Write Fault HDD
Update Map Data - Reset during Update
Update Map Data - User Stops Update
Update Map Data - Map DVD is not compatible with headunit Software, HU has to be updated before installation of Map data.
Update Map Data - Update not finished successfully
Update Map Data - Map data on HDD are not compatible with current HU software
Update Map Data - Wrong PIN Code
Update Map Data - Data Base On DVD Not Consistent
Update Map Data - Data Base On HDD Not Consistent
Update Map Data - Data Base not activated for this car
DISP_C-LVDS Tx+ and Tx- shortcut together
Media Interface not supported device plugged
Media Interface communication Error defective data
Media Interface communication Error unknown data
Media Interface charging current to high
ETC or DSRC general device error
ETC or DSRC Device-Antenna open load
High Speed CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 0 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 1 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 2 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 3 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 4 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 5 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
High Speed HU-CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
Lost communication with Display Rear L
Lost communication with Display Rear R
